details: Package commonweb-balance@99.9.1 is a dependency-confusion attack vehicle. It is an empty stub (no functional code) published at version 99.9.1 that declares a single dependency, ltidisafe, pointing to a remote tarball at hxxps://ltidi[.]storage[.]googleapis[.]com/depenconf/ltidisafe-3[.]4[.]5[.]tgz. The remote tarball is hosted on Google Cloud Storage and is fully attacker-controlled, allowing the attacker to swap its contents at any time to serve arbitrary malicious code to all installers. The package itself contains no executable code — the attack vector is the externally-hosted dependency.

cwes.name: Inclusion of Functionality from Untrusted Control Sphere
